tools.name: find_prospects
tools.description: Find business prospects by industry and location in NZ. Uses Yellow Pages and other scrapers to discover real businesses, deduplicates against existing DB.

tools.name: score_prospect
tools.description: Score a prospect against your Ideal Customer Profile (ICP). Returns fit score 0-100 with detailed breakdown and contributing factors.

tools.name: generate_outreach
tools.description: Generate a personalized outreach message for a prospect using Claude AI sales brain. Returns subject, body, personalization points, and alternative subjects.

tools.name: get_pipeline
tools.description: Get pipeline statistics — prospects by stage, conversion rates, and daily metrics. Free (0 credits).
